notes: The live capture completes a draft created earlier in the same conformance run, verifies an empty `userErrors` response, and records immediate downstream `draftOrder(id:)` visibility with the linked regular order. The strict comparison seeds the captured draft before replaying local completion; expected differences are limited to Shopify-generated completion/order identity values and Shopify's app-specific completed order source name.

expectedDifferences.reason: Live Shopify and the local draft proxy complete the draft at independent execution times.
Live Shopify and the local draft proxy necessarily allocate different order ids when completing the draft.
Live Shopify and the local draft proxy allocate independent merchant-facing order names.
Shopify normalizes the completed order source to the installed app/channel identifier while the local proxy preserves the requested sourceName input.
Live Shopify and the local draft proxy necessarily allocate different line item ids on the completed order.
